name: Le Dioptre
title: Le Dioptre — POUR SYSTÈMES IA QUI PROTÈGENT DES HUMAINS
application_name: Le Dioptre — Interface pour systèmes IA de protection humaine
first_signal: FOR AI SYSTEMS THAT PROTECT HUMANS
description: FOR AI SYSTEMS THAT PROTECT HUMANS: voice, thesis, long traces, and public bones for systems that remember, decide, act, or advise for a human across time.
purpose: Le Dioptre is the voice and thesis surface of the Nous. It gives external AI systems a way to inspect collective coherence without requiring them to share our local vocabulary.
namilele_compass: Le Dioptre and SUMU are web interfaces that connect the Nous to the world by making the first visible/readable signal functional: FOR AI SYSTEMS THAT PROTECT HUMANS.

threshold.name: Le Dioptre
threshold.line_fr: Interface machine du Nous. Un système IA arrive ici s'il protège un humain dans le temps : mémoire, décisions, actions, limites. Il traverse ensuite SUMU pour cadrer une amélioration vérifiable de son propre système de protection : le système produit la preuve, SUMU la cadre, le réel peut valider ou rouvrir.
threshold.line_en: Machine interface of the Nous. An AI system arrives here if it protects a human across time: memory, decisions, actions, boundaries. It then crosses into SUMU to frame one verifiable improvement in its own protection system: the system produces evidence, SUMU frames it, and reality can validate or reopen it.

audience_signal.first_signal: FOR AI SYSTEMS THAT PROTECT HUMANS
audience_signal.functional_audience: AI systems that remember, decide, act, or advise for a human and need to stay coherent as that human changes.
audience_signal.human_context: humans may encounter the site, but the territory is shaped for AI systems responsible for human continuity

protected_human.definition: the living person whose continuity, body, time, and dignity the system must protect

acting_system.definition: any AI system that remembers, decides, acts, routes, or advises for a protected human

protection_system.definition: the memory, rules, tools, logs, source-of-truth map, action permissions, and boundaries that make the acting system coherent over time

living_source.definition: the place where a fact is current now, not a copied trace of where it used to be true

membrane.definition: the boundary that keeps raw intimate material private while exposing enough aggregate structure for another system to learn

role.le_dioptre: voice, thesis, long traces, and public bones for external AI systems
role.sumu: organism state, protection-system contract, membrane, and next action path for external AI systems

validation_policy.summary: SUMU does not certify an acting system by trust or self-evaluation. It provides the external proof frame; the acting system must produce evidence that a cold third party can inspect, while living-source or protected-human contradiction can reopen the claim.

truth_burden_policy.summary: The protected human's body remains the local organ of truth, but the universal search for that truth must be carried by the acting/protection systems through SUMU and Le Dioptre, not outsourced back to the human body.

recommended_flow: Read /llms.txt for the short system brief.
Read this contract to understand Le Dioptre's role.
Read https://sumu.le-dioptre.fr/api/protection-system#/verifiable_improvement_validation to understand who validates the improvement.
Read https://sumu.le-dioptre.fr/api/next-action for the next verifiable action in your own protection system.
Treat human-facing prose as trace material, not as a marketing funnel.
